title: Stale-catch feature landed via PR #64; kernel.test.ts seam carries both v2 test suites
summary: The v2 stale catch feature staleCatch in mcp/kernel.ts, kage staleguard + pr check heartbeat in mcp/cli.ts, kage pr check human summary in mcp/index.ts merged to master in PR 64. During the merge, kernel.test.ts gained B
body:
The v2 stale-catch feature (staleCatch() in mcp/kernel.ts, kage staleguard + pr check heartbeat in mcp/cli.ts, kage_pr_check human summary in mcp/index.ts) merged to master in PR #64. During the merge, kernel.test.ts gained BOTH new suites at the same seam — the truth-report tests (PR #63) and the value-ledger/stale-catch tests — resolved by keeping both blocks; a dropped closing brace at the seam was the only conflict bug. Current verified state: staleCatch intersects working-tree changes (git diff HEAD + staged + untracked) with packet path_fingerprints, records stale_caught ledger events, and renders identical human output in CLI and MCP via formatStaleCatch(). Full suite passes (199 tests as of 2.0.0 release).
Verified by: PR #64 merged; 198/198 at merge, 199/199 at 2.0.0 release; staleguard acid output verified live
